languages.text:
Until the end of combat Eo-gann becomes Immobilized, but can attack ingoring LoS and his weapon range is increased by +100
If he loses immobilized, he also loses this bonus.

Until the end of combat Eo-gann becomes Immobilized, but can attack ingoring LoS and his weapon range is increased by +100

languages.text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

Until the end of combat Eo-gann becomes Immobilized, but can attack ingoring LoS and his weapon range is increased by +100

traits.locale_text: Eogunn becomes {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he stays {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores line of sight while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

languages.text: Эоганн становится {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиженным{/g}. До конца боя, пока он {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}обездвижен{/g}, он может атаковать цели вне своей {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоны видимости{/g}, а максимальная дальность его оружия увеличивается на +100.

traits.locale_text: Эоганн становится {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиженным{/g}. Эоганн становится {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиженным{/g}. До конца боя, пока он {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}обездвижен{/g}, он может атаковать цели вне своей {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоны видимости{/g}, а максимальная дальность его оружия увеличивается на +100.

languages.text: Eogunn queda {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g}. Hasta el final del combate, mientras siga {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}inmovilizado{/g} ignora la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} al atacar y el alcance máximo de sus armas aumenta en +100.
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn queda {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g}. Hasta el final del combate, mientras siga {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}inmovilizado{/g} ignora la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} al atacar y el alcance máximo de sus armas aumenta en +100.

languages.text: Eogunn wird {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g}. Solange er {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}gelähmt{/g} ist, ignoriert er bis zum Ende des Kampfes bei Angriffen {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g}, und die maximale Reichweite seiner Waffen erhöht sich um +100.
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn wird {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g}. Solange er {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}gelähmt{/g} ist, ignoriert er bis zum Ende des Kampfes bei Angriffen {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g}, und die maximale Reichweite seiner Waffen erhöht sich um +100.

languages.text: Eogunn est {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilisé{/g}. Jusqu'à la fin du combat, tant qu'il reste {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilisé{/g}, il ignore la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} en attaquant et la portée maximale de ses armes augmente de +100.
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn est {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilisé{/g}. Jusqu'à la fin du combat, tant qu'il reste {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilisé{/g}, il ignore la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} en attaquant et la portée maximale de ses armes augmente de +100.

languages.text: Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} olur. {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}Felç{/g} kaldığı sürece, çatışma sonuna dek saldırırken {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattını{/g} yok sayar ve silahının maksimum menzili +100 artar.
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} olur. {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}Felç{/g} kaldığı sürece, çatışma sonuna dek saldırırken {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattını{/g} yok sayar ve silahının maksimum menzili +100 artar.

languages.text: 伊奥贡陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}状态。战斗结束之前，只要他保持{g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}定身{/g}状态，他攻击时便不受{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}规则限制，且其武器的最大射程增加100。
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}状态。战斗结束之前，只要他保持{g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}定身{/g}状态，他攻击时便不受{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}规则限制，且其武器的最大射程增加100。

languages.text: エオガンは{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}になる。戦闘終了まで、{g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}移動不能{/g}である限り、彼は攻撃時に{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g}を無視し、武器の最大射程が+100増加する。
languages.original_text: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.

traits.locale_text: エオガンは{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}になる。戦闘終了まで、{g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}移動不能{/g}である限り、彼は攻撃時に{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g}を無視し、武器の最大射程が+100増加する。
